name: Bak Ambalaj Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
summary: Bak Ambalaj Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. produces and sells printed, unprinted, and laminated flexible packaging products for various sectors worldwide. The company offers its packaging products for snack foods, biscuits, sugar and chocolate confectionaries, breads and fresh foods, instant foods and drinks, dried foods and pastas, coffee and tea products, chemicals and hygiene products, and other products. Bak Ambalaj Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. was founded in 1973 and is based in Izmir, Turkey.
